div.h3: fs_getattr: Inode to struct stat Mapping
div.p: Procedure: Translation of internal M2 Inode metadata (On-Disk) to VFS stbuf (Memory) Constraint: POSIX Compliance for 512B Block Accounting

ol.li: Block Consistency: st_blocks MUST reflect 512-byte units for POSIX/du compatibility, regardless of the physical block size of the underlying M2 storage.
Type Safety: Fields are cast from internal fixed-width types (uint16/64) to platform-specific off_t, uid_t, and mode_t.
Timestamps: All uint64_t epoch values are copied directly to st_atim.tv_sec.
